title: filago arenaria
intro: Filago arenaria, commonly known as corn marigold, is an annual or biennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of corn marigold include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Corn marigold is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
